query: SELECT p.slug as places_slug, ml.slug as map_slug FROM places p LEFT JOIN map_locations ml ON p.slug = ml.slug WHERE ml.slug IS NOT NULL LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3FFv3TtDUeNbYDM.root --database JUCCYykxYWxAcNny3wop55 --execute SELECT p.slug as places_slug, ml.slug as map_slug FROM places p LEFT JOIN map_locations ml ON p.slug = ml.slug WHERE ml.slug IS NOT NULL LIMIT 10;
